item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.content:encoded:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: Professional File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Just click on company website www.filerecoverysoftware.org and download File Recovery Software which helps user to fast locate and restore complete erased data, documents from USB removable media disk in easiest way. Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.description:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Just click on company website www.filerecoverysoftware.org and download File Recovery Software which helps user to fast locate and restore complete erased data, documents from USB removable media disk in easiest way. Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Just click on company website www.filerecoverysoftware.org and download File Recovery Software which helps user to fast locate and restore complete erased data, documents from USB removable media disk in easiest way. Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

[read more]

item.title: New Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: New Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
New Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light
7. Easy to install


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

[read more]

New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.

New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu

HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

item.title: USB Drive Files Recovery Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Files Recovery Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

[read more]
